title: cronquistia pringlei
intro: Cronquistia pringlei is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, commonly known as a type of daisy or sunflower. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin irritations, and infections. The plant has been used to provide several health benefits, including reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems such as bronchitis and coughs. Cronquistia pringlei can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion for its herbal properties, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
